# Levviata's Ores
A mod that adds a variety of ores with it's own respective armor and tool sets.

## Description
Like mentioned before, this is a tiny and simple ore mod with a small configuration to disable the respective world generation of each ore. This mod pairs well with Spartan Weaponry and similar due to the implementation of oreDict (compability stuff) in all recipes and tools.

## Features
- Configuration option to disable each individual ore's world gen.
- Raw copper, tin and platinum
- Tin and ore in powder form (smelts into bronze)
- Raw blocks and ingot blocks
- Copper, tin and platinum armor and tools (no bronze yet as of v1.0)
- Ore generation for all ores with granite, andesite and diorite blending
- Recipes
